The tRNA Editing Complex ADAT2/3 Promotes Cancer Cell Growth and Codon-biased mRNA Translation

evidence_entities.text: ADAT2 and ADAT3 are amplified and overexpressed in human tumors
ADAT2 and ADAT3 are required for cancer cell growth and tumorigenicity
ADAT2 catalytic activity promotes growth of liposarcoma cells
Decreased A-to-I tRNA editing in ADAT2-depleted LPS cells
ADAT2 deficiency leads to codon-biased changes in mRNA translation
ADAT2 knockdown impairs translation, alters the proteome, and promotes protein aggregation
